notes: Projects can now save optional run instructions that are automatically prepended when you start new work, helping every run follow your project-specific guidance.
New runs can create their source branch for you directly from the run settings, so you can start from the right branch without switching to Git manually.
The run chat composer is easier to use with large pasted content: multi-line pastes are collapsed into compact tokens that keep the prompt readable while preserving the full text.
Board cards handle long task descriptions more cleanly, keeping the board scannable while preserving the full description when you open the task.
On macOS, project discovery now focuses on the folders most likely to contain code, including Developer, reducing unnecessary permission prompts while still finding local projects.

commands.deb: sudo apt update && sudo apt install --only-upgrade orkestra-os
